column1: # Building development stages: one row per BuildingStageDef asset (created by import if missing
# stages in row order into BuildingStagePool assets — row order IS track order
# first row is the revival stage (its material doubles as the building's maintenance material).
# The material-availability gate is implicit (material/costPerTick); extra gates — e.g. the old
# requiredSpecialization — are rows in stage_conditions.csv. progressCost 4 = iteration-26 baseline.
